case_title: SHELDON FONG VS. KELLY BENNETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, SHELDON AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, KELLY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-04-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-08-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. *** NOTE: THIS CASE IS SUBJECT TO DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND COMPLIANCE. *** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-09-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SHELDON FONG FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-18-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-04-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SHELDON FONG FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-18-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-04-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. [VACATED PER COURT'S ORAL ORDER AT THE 4-09-19 OSC HEARING.]

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SHELDON FONG FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-05-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-21-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. [VACATED PER COURT'S ORAL ORDER AT THE 4-09-19 OSC HEARING.]
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, SHELDON

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by self represented plaintiff. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to DEC-18-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Aug-08-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
